Orders for care may indicate a specific range in the frequency of visits to ensure that the 
most appropriate level of services is provided to home health patients under a home 
health plan of care. When a range of visits is ordered, the upper limit of the range is 
considered the specific frequency. 

EXAMPLE 2:
